name: Rivian Automotive, Inc.
description: Rivian Automotive, Inc. is an American electric vehicle manufacturer and automotive technology company founded in 2009. The company designs, develops, and manufactures category-defining electric vehicles and accessories, specifically focusing on the R1T pickup truck and R1S SUV for the consumer market, as well as Electric Delivery Vans (EDV) for commercial fleets. Rivian is dedicated to creating products and services that help our planet transition to carbon-neutral energy and transportation, emphasizing adventure and sustainability through its vertically integrated ecosystem of hardware, software, and charging infrastructure.
